category_sources: Qt official documentation describes Qt as a cross-platform software development framework.
source_facts.description says Qt is a cross-platform application and UI framework.
display_name_sources: Qt official documentation and project pages use the name Qt.
docs_sources: Qt official documentation is hosted at doc.qt.io and labels itself Qt Documentation.
repo_sources: Qt official source documentation says Qt sources are obtained from the top-level qt5 Git repository at code.qt.io.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Qt official docs cover C++ and QML APIs for the framework.
source_facts.description identifies an application and UI framework.
